title: orthrosanthus monadelphus subsp. exsertus
intro: Orthrosanthus monadelphus subsp. exsertus is a plant species that belongs to the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the iris family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Orthrosanthus monadelphus subsp. exsertus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
